scripts.build:prod: cd .. && PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m scraper.finalize_public_export --quiet && cd web && node scripts/generate-city-centroids.mjs && node scripts/generate-auction-routes.mjs && NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL=https://scrapauctionindia.com NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_PATH=/auctions next build && node scripts/prepare-public-data.mjs && node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs && node scripts/generate-launch-readiness.mjs
scripts.verify-build: node scripts/verify-deploy-prereqs.mjs && node scripts/verify-build.mjs && node scripts/verify-auction-filters.mjs && node scripts/verify-lot-sections.mjs && node scripts/verify-search-ranking.mjs && node scripts/verify-card-layout.mjs && node scripts/verify-analytics.mjs && node scripts/verify-paywall.mjs && node scripts/verify-sitemap.mjs && node scripts/verify-auction-pages.mjs && node scripts/verify-seo-meta.mjs && node scripts/verify-structured-data.mjs && node scripts/generate-seo-report.mjs && node scripts/verify-seo-report.mjs && node scripts/generate-launch-readiness.mjs && node scripts/verify-launch-readiness.mjs && node scripts/verify-airbnb-design.mjs && node scripts/verify-app-readiness.mjs
